openFindings.title: Cache key ignores document content
openFindings.description: generateCacheKey() hashes only provider, query, and sorted document ids, while cache hits return cached results directly. Reused ids with changed content can therefore be counted as hits and served stale reranks.

openFindings.title: Packet docs still point at a removed sibling research path
openFindings.description: The migrated packet still cites ../research/research.md from plan/tasks/checklist/decision-record even though that relative path no longer exists under the renumbered tree, leaving the implementation rationale non-replayable from the packet itself.

openFindings.title: description.json parentChain still encodes the old phase number
openFindings.description: The packet now lives under 001-search-and-routing-tuning, but description.json still records 010-search-and-routing-tuning in parentChain, leaving metadata lineage out of sync with the canonical packet id.

openFindings.title: Stale-hit and eviction telemetry remain unprotected by targeted regression tests
openFindings.description: Telemetry increments staleHits and evictions in live cache paths, but the test suite only exercises the fresh-hit path and zero-reset boundary. A future refactor can silently break two of the four counters without failing the current contract tests.

openFindings.title: Decision record still advertises the phase as planned
openFindings.description: decision-record.md still uses status: planned while spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md, checklist.md, and implementation-summary.md all mark the packet complete, so status-bearing packet docs disagree on completion state.
